note: Re-packed 2026-07-18 to fix a stale-codegen bug: the previous tarball (base commit e4680b8, per its own provenance a staged/uncommitted patch) predated the settlement_mode field being added to MarketExpression in both the Rust program and the SDK's committed codama-generated bindings. The stale packed dist/generated/types/marketExpression.js silently omitted settlement_mode from its Borsh encoder, corrupting every create_market instruction built through it (Anchor error 102, InstructionDidNotDeserialize) -- discovered via a real Surfpool integration test against the vendored program. Slip's own source (packages/sdk/src) was already correct; this was purely a stale packed-artifact problem, fixed by rebuilding (`pnpm --filter @slip/sdk build`) and repacking (`pnpm pack`) from current Slip HEAD, no Slip source changes required.
